title: Migrate open repos and refresh profile links
description: Move public xagent-labs repos xpense and xagt-plugin to xagentAI, then update org profile Product Surface and activity calendar.

title: Restyle profile README as product matrix
description: Replace simple What We Are Building copy with product matrix, architecture narrative, how-it-works flow, and dark dense activity SVG.
close_reason: Profile README restyled with product matrix and dark activity graph

title: Use official XAgent logo in profile banner
description: Replace abstract signal mark in profile banner with the official XAgent avatar/logo.
close_reason: Updated profile banner to use the official XAgent logo from the GitHub avatar.

title: Add SaaSHub badge to profile README
description: Add official SaaSHub approved badge/link to organization profile README.
close_reason: Added official SaaSHub approved badge to profile README.

title: Migrate remaining xagent-labs repos
description: Transfer remaining xagent-labs repositories to xagentAI where possible; handle naming conflicts explicitly.
notes: Remaining cleanup blocked: transferred x-agent-redirect, xagent-labs.github.io, and xagent-public are only READ for current account after transfer, so they cannot be deleted or archived from this token.

title: Refine What We Are Building section
description: Replace table-like What We Are Building layout with a more polished narrative/capability layout.
close_reason: Replaced table layouts with polished narrative sections.

title: Clarify product surface links
description: Clarify Product Surface with public links and explicit not-public statuses.
close_reason: Clarified public links and not-public statuses in Product Surface.

title: Refine profile activity section
description: Make XAgent profile activity feel more active and remove visible banner options while preserving alternate banner assets.
close_reason: Refined activity calendar into public commit signal view and removed visible banner options from README.

title: Refresh profile activity calendar SVG
description: Update profile/activity-calendar.svg only to make the public GitHub activity visual denser and include day and hour signal language.
acceptance_criteria: profile/activity-calendar.svg updated; profile/README.md untouched; white/green visual system preserved
close_reason: Updated profile/activity-calendar.svg with denser day/hour activity signal visual.

title: Upgrade XAgent org README
description: Rewrite organization profile README, add contribution activity calendar, and provide multiple banner options.
acceptance_criteria: README avoids numbered 1-2-3 style; includes polished banner option(s), activity calendar, clean GitHub rendering, current repo links, and concise premium positioning.
close_reason: Replaced external activity graph with local white activity calendar SVG generated from GitHub public API data.

comments.author: xiaozihao
comments.text: User rejected generated raster banners and black-heavy direction. New direction: white-first visual system inspired by /Volumes/T7 Shield/design/wild-craft/signal.html; avoid black blocks and numbered sections.
